title: MCLN EX78 Task UI Column Additions Configuration Guide
fullText:
center 83548 EX78 – Task UI Column Additions Configuration Guide Table of Contents Contents This document details the configuration steps for the EX78 – Tasks UI Column Additions. Note, there is no system code enablement for EX78. TOC \o \z \u \h 1. TASKs UI customization PAGEREF _Toc156842748 \h 2 1. TASK s UI customization 1. Navigate to the Tasks UI 2. Select Tools--> Customize from the Menu 3. Selection Customization Type: Company Level 3. Select the new column additions and click Add. Repeat for each column (Stop, Shipment, Load Sequence, Task Group, User Name). Click Save . 5. Refresh Tasks UI, new column additions added.

[Document: MCLN EX78 Task UI Column Additions Configuration Guide]

center 83548 EX78 – Task UI Column Additions Configuration Guide Table of Contents Contents This document details the configuration steps for the EX78 – Tasks UI Column Additions. Note, there is no system code enablement for EX78. TOC     1. TASKs UI customization  1. TASK s UI customization 1. Navigate to the Tasks UI 2. Select Tools--> Customize from the Menu 3. Selection Customization Type: Company Level 3. Select the new column additions and click Add. Repeat for each column (Stop, Shipment, Load Sequence, Task Group, User Name). Click Save . 5. Refresh Tasks UI, new column additions added.
